## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] Targets `develop` (or `main` for hotfixes) per Git Flow
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes (strict)
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes; new behaviour has tests
- [ ] No secrets committed; all config via environment variables
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CHANGELOG) if behaviour changed
